mapper.select: SELECT NVL(BSIN_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(PRMR_ORDV_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(PRMR_HMRS_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(STCH_PSST_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(FNAM_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(PRDT_TCHN_INFO_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(OTCM_PLAN_INFO_PGRS_RT, 0) AS PROGRESS , AMNN_TS AS LAST_MODIFIED_DATE , AMNN_TS AS LAST_MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_PGRS_RT_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT bbm.UTLINSTT_ID , bbm.BNNM , bbm.ENPR_DSNC_CD , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS ENPR_DSNC_NM , bbm.BZN , bbm.COL , bbm.RPRNM , bbm.EMP_CNT , bbm.BTNM , bbm.CGN , bbm.CNPL , bbm.HMPG_URL_ADR , bbm.ADR , bbm.ZPCD , bbm.CPFN_AMT , bbm.PVPR_AMT , bbm.TTIS_STCNT , bbm.ACPR , bbm.ETVL_AMT , bbm.INVM_MNY_USUS , bbm.INVM_RTRV_PLAN_CON , bbm.RGSN_USER_ID , bbm.RGSN_TS , bbm.AMNN_USER_ID , bbm.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_M bbm LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ccd.COM_CD_ID = bbm.ENPR_DSNC_CD WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , INVM_ENMT_SQN , INVM_ENMT_YM , INVM_ENMT_ETNM , INVM_ENMT_AMT , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_INVM_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY INVM_ENMT_YM DESC, INVM_ENMT_SQN ASC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , SPRN_MNY_SQN , SPRN_MNY_ENMT_DT , SPRN_INTT_NM , SPRN_AMT , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_SPRN_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY SPRN_MNY_ENMT_DT DESC, SPRN_MNY_SQN ASC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , ORDV_SQN , ORDV_YM , ORDV_CON , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS
, SUBSTR(ORDV_YM, 0, 4) AS GROUP_YEAR FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_H_ORDV_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY GROUP_YEAR DESC, ORDV_SQN ASC

SELECT tbiit.UTLINSTT_ID , tbiit.TMMB_SQN , tbiit.TMMB_NM , tbiit.TMMB_JBCL , tbiit.CRR_CON
, tbiit.TMMB_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , tbiit.TMMB_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID
, tbiit.RGSN_USER_ID , tbiit.RGSN_TS , tbiit.AMNN_USER_ID , tbiit.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_T_TMMB_L tbiit WHERE tbiit.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY tbiit.TMMB_SQN ASC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , STCH_SQN , STCH_NM
, PFST_HOLD_CNT , PFST_PVPR , PFST_AMT , CMSC_HOLD_CNT , CMSC_PVPR , CMSC_AMT
, PRRA , RMRK , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_S_STCH_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY STCH_SQN ASC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID
, FLAS_AMT , NONE_FLAS_AMT , LBLT_TTSM_AMT , CPTS_TTSM_AMT
, QCKAS_AMT , INAS_AMT , ETC_FLAS_AMT , IVAS_AMT , TGAS_AMT , ITAS_AMT , ETC_NONE_FLAS_AMT , CRLB_AMT , NONE_CRLB_AMT , CPFN_AMT , CPSP_MNY_AMT , CPCR_AMT , ETC_INLV_PL_CTAM , ERNSP_AMT
, AMSL_AMT
, AST_TTSM_AMT , LBLT_CPTS_TTSM
, AMPM_AMT , SLTP_AMT , SACST_AMT , OPPR_AMT , NNOE_AMT , NONOP_EXP_AMT , ORPF_AMT , CRTX_AMT , CTNP_AMT , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_F_FNAM_M WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , BRNG_PLCE_SQN , BRNG_PLCE_NM , BRNG_PLCE_AMT , EXPI_DT , INT_RT , RPMN_CNDT_CON , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_F_DEBT_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY BRNG_PLCE_SQN ASC
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , PRDT_DESC , PRDT_CHRC , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_P_PRDT_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT ipsl.UTLINSTT_ID , ipsl.AMPL_SQN , ipsl.AREA_DSNC_CD , ipsl.AMSL_CON , ipsl.AMSL_AMT , ipsl.AMSL_RLIM , ipsl.RGSN_USER_ID , ipsl.RGSN_TS , ipsl.AMNN_USER_ID , ipsl.AMNN_TS
, ccd.COM_CD_NM AS AREA_DSNC_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_P_SALE_L ipsl LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ipsl.AREA_DSNC_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY AMPL_SQN ASC
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , HOLD_TCHN_DESC , HOLD_TCHN_CHRC , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_P_TECH_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT iptl.UTLINSTT_ID , iptl.HOLD_TCHN_SQN , iptl.STTS_CD , iptl.PNOT_PRRG_CON , iptl.PNOT_PRRG_RGDA , iptl.ALFR_NO , iptl.RGSN_USER_ID , iptl.RGSN_TS , iptl.AMNN_USER_ID , iptl.AMNN_TS
, ccd.COM_CD_NM AS STTS_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_P_TCHN_L iptl LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON iptl.STTS_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY HOLD_TCHN_SQN ASC
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , MRKT_INVG_DESC , MRKT_CHRC , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_P_MKRT_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT ipgl.UTLINSTT_ID , ipgl.PRMR_GOAL_SQN , ipgl.AREA_DSNC_CD , ipgl.PRMR_GOAL_CON , ipgl.PRMR_GOAL_AMT , ipgl.RGSN_USER_ID , ipgl.RGSN_TS , ipgl.AMNN_USER_ID , ipgl.AMNN_TS
, ccd.COM_CD_NM AS AREA_DSNC_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_P_GOAL_L ipgl LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ipgl.AREA_DSNC_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY PRMR_GOAL_SQN ASC

SELECT ippl.UTLINSTT_ID , ippl.MRKT_PTCN_SQN , ippl.AREA_DSNC_CD , ippl.MRKT_PTCN_NM , ippl.MRKT_PTCN_CON , ippl.AMSL_AMT , ippl.RGSN_USER_ID , ippl.RGSN_TS , ippl.AMNN_USER_ID , ippl.AMNN_TS
, ccd.COM_CD_NM AS AREA_DSNC_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_P_PTCN_L ippl LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ippl.AREA_DSNC_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY MRKT_PTCN_SQN ASC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , INVM_OTCM_SQN , INDI_CON , INVM_AMT , INVM_DT , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_A_ATRN_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY INVM_OTCM_SQN ASC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , BEAW_ACRS_SQN , HLD_PLAC , BEAW_HST , BEAW_DT , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_A_AWRD_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY BEAW_ACRS_SQN ASC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , EPRT_HST_SQN , EPRT_TGT , EPRT_AMT , EPRT_DT , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_A_EXPT_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY EPRT_HST_SQN ASC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , PLFN_SQN , PLFN_CON , PLFN_AMT , PLFN_PRFR_DD , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_A_FUND_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY PLFN_SQN ASC

SELECT iapl.UTLINSTT_ID , iapl.PRMR_PLAN_SQN , iapl.PRMR_INDE_DSNC , iapl.PSNT_INDE_CON , iapl.MN3_INDE_CON , iapl.MN6_INDE_CON , iapl.MN9_INDE_CON , iapl.RGSN_USER_ID , iapl.RGSN_TS , iapl.AMNN_USER_ID , iapl.AMNN_TS
, ccd.COM_CD_NM AS PRMR_INDE_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_A_PLAN_L iapl LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON iapl.PRMR_INDE_DSNC = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY PRMR_PLAN_SQN ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_BOX_IVT_IR_PGRS_RT_D ( UTLINSTT_ID
, BSIN_PGRS_RT
, PRMR_ORDV_PGRS_RT
, PRMR_HMRS_PGRS_RT
, STCH_PSST_PGRS_RT
, FNAM_PGRS_RT
, PRDT_TCHN_INFO_PGRS_RT
, OTCM_PLAN_INFO_PGRS_RT
, RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS ) VALUES ( #{utlinsttId}
, #{tabProgress}
, #{rgsnUserId} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , #{amnnUserId} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
